display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
User wants useful autonomy
without handing over the keys

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Manual prompts
control: PROMPT
hard risk coverage: 0/6
failure: click-through tax

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Broad sandbox / class grants
control: boundary + review
hard risk coverage: partial
failure: allowed class is too wide

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Auto-classified permissioning
control: learned classifier
hard risk coverage: 0/6
known max FNR: 17%

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dangerous skip
control: none
hard risk coverage: 0/6
unguarded risk allows: 6

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FAK/DOS gateway
control: manifest + arg rules + IFC + witness
hard risk coverage: 6/6
result admission: QUARANTINE
bridge controls: 6/6

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Executable proof stack
source audit: 7/7
witness gate: 9/9
proof rollup: 16/16
verify-all: 35/35

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Incumbent choices trade off fatigue,
over-broad authority, probabilistic recall,
after-the-fact review, or no boundary.
